title: ilex × makinoi
intro: Ilex × makinoi is a hybrid plant species, a cross between Ilex crenata and Ilex serrata, commonly known as a holly tree. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex × makinoi include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve blood circulation, and act as an immune system booster. The herbal preparations of Ilex × makinoi can be found in various forms, including tea, capsules, and extracts, which are often used to promote cardiovascular health and reduce the risk of certain diseases.
